sentiment.summary: Markets rallied strongly this week on US-Iran ceasefire hopes, retreating oil, and a soft CPI print — S&P 500 +3% and Nasdaq +4% for the week.

insights.text: Relief rally on ceasefire hopes and soft CPI — best week since November. S&P 500 +3%, Nasdaq +4% on the week. Oil retreated from $110+ peaks as US-Iran peace talks advanced in Pakistan. Core CPI came in 0.2% vs 0.3% expected. Risk-on into the weekend.

BTC just below your $73,135 cost basis at $72,204. Ceasefire rally and soft CPI pushed crypto higher from April lows. Tax-season selling keeps a lid on it. Consolidation in $68K–$76K range likely through April, with $76K median target by month end.

RKLB upgraded to Outperform — $474M raise and Mynaric acquisition approved. 85th launch complete, largest hypersonic contract signed. At $68.05, up ~10% from $62.04 basis. Citizens upgrade, avg analyst target $71, $1.3B SDA satellite contract now in-house.

SpaceX $17B spectrum deal lifting SATS — up 12.7% from $114.33 basis at ~$128.80. FCC spectrum-sharing votes ahead are a key catalyst. Warning: GF fair value just $16.84 and insiders sold $15.5M in 3 months. Ride the SpaceX wave but keep stops tight.

T1 Energy bleeding — down 30% from $6.73 basis at ~$4.73. Q4 badly missed expectations, stock down 41.8% in 30 days, Zacks downgraded to Strong Sell. Texas 2.1GW solar buildout is the long-term thesis, but execution risk is extreme right now.

Seagate on 8-day 39% tear — new all-time highs on AI demand. Morgan Stanley named it top pick with $582 target. HDD supply shortages projected through 2028. At ~$500, you're up 11% from $448.98 basis. Analyst high target is $700 — consider trailing stop.

Telesat near 52-week highs — up 29% from your $33.33 basis at ~$43.15. Northwestel Lightspeed LEO deal formalized, first satellites launch late 2026. Deutsche Bank raised target to $37. Key risk: $1.7B debt matures December 2026 — watch for dilutive financing.

BigBear.ai in freefall — down 63% from your $9.02 basis at $3.34. Revenue crashed 38% in Q4, full-year 2025 down 37.7%. Price targets cut to $5. Recapitalization raised $462M liquidity. Ask Sage $25M ARR target is the only near-term catalyst to watch.

Nebius exploding — $27B Meta deal plus $19.4B Microsoft contract. Up 21% in one week, at $145.19 you're up 10.7% from $131.12 basis. Scaling from 170MW to 1GW by end 2026. Strong Buy consensus, targets up to $215. Your strongest position right now.

Oklo gets DoE + NRC approvals — stock still crushed, down 61% from $125 basis at ~$48.65. CEO and CFO actively selling shares in April. Pre-revenue with $139M 2025 operating loss. $2.5B cash runway is the only safety net. Full commercial NRC approval still pending.

NVTS just below your $10.00 basis at $9.50 — analyst consensus target only $7.60. AI power board at NVIDIA GTC sparked 10.8% spike but profit-taking followed. CFO transition adds uncertainty. FY25 revenue down 45% YoY — the AI story needs to convert to real sales.
